パッケージ
gov.nist.javax.sdp.fields の使用

gov.nist.javax.sdp.fields を使用しているパッケージ
gov.nist.javax.sdp   
gov.nist.javax.sdp.fields   
gov.nist.javax.sdp.parser   
 

gov.nist.javax.sdp により使用される gov.nist.javax.sdp.fields のクラス
BandwidthField
          Bandwidth field of a SDP header.
ConnectionField
          Connectin Field of the SDP request.
InformationField
          Information field implementation
KeyField
          Key field part of an SDP header.
MediaField
          Media field SDP header.
RepeatField
          Repeat SDP Field (part of the time field).
SDPField
          Placeholder root class for SDP headers.
TimeField
          Time Field.
 

gov.nist.javax.sdp.fields により使用される gov.nist.javax.sdp.fields のクラス
ConnectionAddress
          Connection Address of the SDP header (appears as part of the Connection field)
Email
          Email address record.
EmailAddress
          email address field of the SDP header.
SDPField
          Placeholder root class for SDP headers.
SDPFieldNames
          Field names for SDP Fields.
SDPObject
          Root class for everything in this package.
SDPObjectList
           
TypedTime
           
ZoneAdjustment
          Zone adjustment class.
 

gov.nist.javax.sdp.parser により使用される gov.nist.javax.sdp.fields のクラス
AttributeField
          Attribute Field.
BandwidthField
          Bandwidth field of a SDP header.
ConnectionAddress
          Connection Address of the SDP header (appears as part of the Connection field)
ConnectionField
          Connectin Field of the SDP request.
Email
          Email address record.
EmailField
          email field in the SDP announce.
InformationField
          Information field implementation
KeyField
          Key field part of an SDP header.
MediaField
          Media field SDP header.
OriginField
          Origin Field SDP header
PhoneField
          Phone Field SDP header
ProtoVersionField
          Proto version field of SDP announce.
RepeatField
          Repeat SDP Field (part of the time field).
SDPField
          Placeholder root class for SDP headers.
SessionNameField
           
TimeField
          Time Field.
TypedTime
           
URIField
          Implementation of URI field.
ZoneField
          Z= SDP field.
